ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stamps" (
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stamp was created */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the stamp was created */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event associated with the stamp */,
  "human_id" INTEGER /* ID of the human involved in the stamp */,
  "human_role" TEXT /* Role of the human involved in the stamp */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image or video associated with the stamp */,
  "using_circle" INTEGER /* Whether the stamp is using a circle (1) or not (0) */,
  "using_arrow" INTEGER /* Whether the stamp is using an arrow (1) or not (0) */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people in the environment */,
  "number_of_people_in_group" INTEGER /* Number of people in the group */,
  "group_radius" REAL /* Radius of the group */,
  "distance_to_group" REAL /* Distance from the robot to the group */,
  "robot_within_group" INTEGER /* Whether the robot is within the group (1) or not (0) */,
  "robot_facing_group" INTEGER /* Whether the robot is facing the group (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stamp associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, low) */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that captured the image */,
  "camera_settings" TEXT /* Camera settings used to capture the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_stamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("stamp_id") REFERENCES stamps ("stamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot position */,
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stamp associated with the robot position */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the robot position */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the robot position */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the robot position */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the robot (quaternion) */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the robot at the time of the position reading */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the robot at the time of the position reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that captured the position reading */,
  "sensor_data" TEXT /* Data from the sensor that captured the position reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_positions_stamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("stamp_id") REFERENCES stamps ("stamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each human position */,
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stamp associated with the human position */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the human position */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the human position */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the human position */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the human (quaternion) */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the human at the time of the position reading */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the human at the time of the position reading */,
  "movement_pattern" TEXT /* Movement pattern of the human (e.g., walking, standing, sitting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_positions_stamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("stamp_id") REFERENCES stamps ("stamp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, developer) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission the user has (e.g., admin, researcher, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stamp associated with the access log */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("stamp_id") REFERENCES stamps ("stamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "stamp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stamp associated with the annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., text, audio, video) */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format of the annotation (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_stamp_id FOREIGN KEY ("stamp_id") REFERENCES stamps ("stamp_id")
)
